articles.title: Birmingham Phoenix beat Trent Rockets in record-breaking thriller
articles.summary: Birmingham Phoenix set a record-breaking innings at Edgbaston with a whopping 214 - the highest score Edgbaston has ever seen in The Hundred. Despite a valiant chase and a mighty response of 204 from Trent Rockets, the target ultimately proved too tough to reach.

# Birmingham Phoenix beat Trent Rockets in record-breaking thriller

## This content is not available in your location.

There was an error

Birmingham Phoenix set a record-breaking innings at Edgbaston with a whopping 214 - the highest score Edgbaston has ever seen in The Hundred. Despite a valiant chase and a mighty response of 204 from Trent Rockets, the target ultimately proved too tough to reach.

MATCH REPORT: [Phoenix beat Rockets in high-scoring thriller](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/cricket/articles/c5yw250305no)

_Available to UK users only._

*   Published 1 hour ago

articles.title: Real Madrid confident of signing Rodri - Saturday's gossip
articles.summary: Real Madrid are confident they will sign Rodri from Man City, Arsenal eye player-plus-cash deal for Atletico striker Julian Alvarez, while Roma are keen on Fulham winger Oscar Bobb, plus more.

**_Real Madrid are confident they will sign Rodri from_**[**_Manchester City_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/manchester-city)**_,_**[**_Arsenal_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/arsenal)**_eye player-plus-cash deal for Atletico striker Julian Alvarez, while Roma are keen on_**[**_Fulham_**](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/teams/fulham)**_winger Oscar Bobb, plus more._**
